subcodes.first_line: O thou servant of the Dawning-Place of the lights of the Most Great Name! A letter was penned aforetime, and now this epistle too [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای خادم حرم مطلع انوار اسم اعظم در پیش چیزی مرقوم شد و حال نیز این نامه
subcodes.subjects: @Shrines and Holy places, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @martyrs and martyrdom, @thankfulness; gratitude, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
